items.title: Three sections of pyproject.toml
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  PP["pyproject.toml"] --> BS["[build-system]
• requires (build deps)
• build-backend"]
  PP --> PR["[project]
• name, version, deps
• scripts, classifiers"]
  PP --> TL["[tool.*]
• pytest, mypy, ruff,
  setuptools/hatch, etc."]
items.caption: One file, three roles: tell pip how to build, declare what the project is, configure every tool.

items.title: Build flow with pyproject
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Src["source tree\n+ pyproject.toml"] --> Pip["pip / python -m build"]
  Pip --> Iso["isolated env"]
  Iso --> Backend["build backend\n(setuptools/hatch/...)"]
  Backend --> Wheel["wheel (.whl)"]
  Backend --> Sdist["sdist (.tar.gz)"]
  Wheel --> Install["pip install"]
  Sdist --> Install
items.caption: Pip reads `[build-system]`, sets up an isolated env, calls the backend, gets back a wheel + sdist.
